title: Aurora, Official Merchandise, 12967, The Gruffalo's Child, 7In, Soft Toy, Brown & White
features: From the best-selling children's book The Gruffalo’s Child by author Julia Donaldson and Alex Scheffler
Adorable The Gruffalo's Child Soft Toy, perfect present for children.
Soft and extremely touchable soft toy made with high quality materials.
description: From the manufacturer The Gruffalo's Child This Gruffalo's Child 7" is inspired from the Julia Donaldson children's book - The Gruffalo, illustrated by Axel Scheffler. She comes with her favourite felt Stick Man in her hand. Made from fine plush materials, now you can have your very own soft and cuddly Gruffalo's Child to love and take everywhere with you
